errPwLen: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errResetEmail: Enter the email address for your account.
errOtp: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
sentCode: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to verify your email.
sentReset: If an account exists for {{email}}, we sent it a 6-digit reset code. Enter it below.
emailVerified: Email verified. Choose a new password.
setNewPwDefault: Set a new password for your account.
encNote: Note: this resets your account sign-in password only. If you turned on end-to-end encryption, your encryption passphrase is separate and is not changed here.
registerSub: Create your account to securely sync across all your devices. If you've been exploring as a guest, your data comes with you.
resetSub: Enter your account email and we'll send you a 6-digit code to set a new password.
signinSub: Sign in to sync your data to this device. You'll stay signed in.
switchToSignin: Already have an account? Sign in
friendlyExists: That email already has an account. Switch to Sign in instead.
friendlyExpired: That code is invalid or expired. Try resending.
friendlyNotConfirmed: Please verify your email first (check for the code).
